text:
Navigating these spaces, I feel both anticipation and curiosity. The first scene’s empty meeting room, encased in glass and silence, invites speculation about the conversations and decisions it will eventually host. I become aware of my solitude, as if on the cusp of activity yet untouched by it.

The second space, vibrant in color and dense with text and displays, generates a subtle excitement—a promise of discovery. It feels like a shrine to inquiry, the wall brightly imploring me to think, ask, and innovate. Here, surrounded by symbols of research and development, I sense both the gravity and playfulness of human intellect. There is possibility in the air, and I am drawn to it, eager to understand the stories suggested by these artifacts.
